issues.sample: THE SLIDING DOOR ON THE DRIVERS SIDE.  I OPENED IT AND THEN IT WOULD NOT CLOSE.  A LITTLE PLASTIC SPRING / PLUNGER FROM THE "B" POST HAD ATTACHED ITSELF TO THE PIN ON THE DOOR AND WOULD NOT ALLOW THE DOOR TO CLOSE.  THERE WAS NO WAY TO GET THE DOOR TO CLOSE OTHER THAN TO MANUALLY

THE FORD 2014 INTERIOR DASHBOARD LIGHTING IS ALWAYS ON, AND VERY OFTEN AT NIGHT DUE TO THIS CONDITION I FORGET TO TURN ON MY DRIVING LIGHTS, MAKING FOR A HAZARDOUS SITUATION.  BECAUSE THE INSTRUMENTS (SPEEDOMETER, TACHOMETER, FUEL AND TEMP GAUGE) ARE NESTED IN DEEP BEZELS FORD HA

THE DRIVER'S SIDE DOOR OF MY VEHICLE WILL NO LONGER LATCH. THIS PROBLEM APPEARED WITHOUT ANY PRECIPITATING EVENT, JUST ORDINARY USE OF THE DOOR. WHEN I RESEARCHED THE PROBLEM ONLINE, I SEE THAT THE FORD MOTOR COMPANY HAS RECALLED VEHICLES OF THE SAME MODEL AND YEAR WITH THIS PROB

TOOK VEHICLE IN FOR THE FIRST OIL CHANGE AND IT WAS NOTED THE TRANS AXLE WAS LEAKING. THIS IS THE 2ND VEHICLE WE HAVE THAT THIS HAS HAPPENED TO - 2014 FORD TRANSIT CONNECT. FORD DOES NOT SEEM CONCERNED ABOUT IT. THE FIRST VEHICLE TOOK ~ 2 WEEKS TO GET REPAIRED. FORD HAS ORDERED T

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2014 FORD TRANSIT CONNECT. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE VEHICLE STALLED. THE CONTACT RECEIVED  NOTIFICATION OF NHTSA CAMPAIGN NUMBER: 15V005000 (FUEL SYSTEM) HOWEVER, THE PART TO DO THE REPAIR WAS UNAVAILABLE. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE MANUFACTURER EXCEEDE

narrative.headline: What 2014 Ford Transit Connect owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 126 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Structure (22% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: THE SLIDING DOOR ON THE DRIVERS SIDE.  I OPENED IT AND THEN IT WOULD NOT CLOSE.  A LITTLE PLASTIC SPRING / PLUNGER FROM THE "B" POST HAD ATTACHED ITSELF TO THE PIN ON THE DOOR AND WOULD NOT ALLOW THE DOOR TO CLOSE.  THERE WAS NO WAY TO GET THE DOOR TO CLOSE OTHER THAN TO MANUALLY
issues.title: Structure
